tasks.subject: P3 Task 1: Plan/memory/preference DTOs + config
tasks.description: PlanStep + AgentSession.Plan; AgentIncident; PreferenceStatus + AgentPreference; config MemoryEnabled/MaxIncidents/RecallTopK. Verify: go test ./daemon/dto/ -run TestAgent -v

tasks.subject: P3 Task 2: Memory store (episodic+semantic+recall)
tasks.description: memory.Store JSON: AddIncident/ListIncidents/Recall(token-overlap) + preferences add/list/confirm/active + Save/Load. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/memory/ -v

tasks.subject: P3 Task 3: Recall injection + episodic write
tasks.description: Service.memory field (NewService +mem, update all call sites); recall.go injectRecall/finalize/recallContext/signatureFor; wire into 3 entrypoints; no incident on awaiting_approval. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run 'Recall|Finalize|Memory' -v

tasks.subject: P3 Task 4: Planner (goal -> plan steps)
tasks.description: planner.go plan()/planSummary(); StartSession-only; best-effort nil on parse fail; prepend planner mock response to existing StartSession tests. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run Plan -v

tasks.subject: P3 Task 5: Suggest-not-mutate learning + runbook proposals
tasks.description: remediation.RunbookStore; propose_preference/propose_runbook RiskReadOnly tools (PENDING); ConfirmPreference; policy gate auto-approves on active auto_approve_tool pref (forbid wins). Verify: go test ./daemon/services/remediation/ -run RunbookStore -v && go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run 'Learning|Pref|AutoApprove' -v

tasks.subject: P3 Task 6: Multi-turn chat (SendMessage)
tasks.description: SendMessage continues Completed/Failed sessions (append user msg, runLoop, finalize, persist); awaiting/not-found/empty error. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/agent/ -run SendMessage -v

tasks.subject: P3 Task 7: REST + MCP surface + orchestrator wiring
tasks.description: bootstrap builds+wires memory+runbook stores+RegisterLearningTools; REST messages/memory/preferences-confirm; MCP send_message/get_memory/confirm_preference; accessors. Verify: go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run Agent -v && go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ -run Agent -v && go build ./...

tasks.subject: P3 Task 8: Docs, CHANGELOG, CodeRabbit, Unraid verify
tasks.description: USER-ORDERED GATE. CHANGELOG+docs+swagger; pre-commit+test; CodeRabbit CLI; ansible build,deploy,verify; real-provider integration (plan+memory+chat+suggest-not-mutate). Verify: make pre-commit-run && make test && ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify
